changelog: Initial stable spec — establishes the contract all future versions must remain backward-compatible with.
_note: This file is the versioned contract between SOCIII and creators. If your worker-spec.json declares 'sociii-sdk-version: 1.0.0', everything in this file is guaranteed to work for the lifetime of the v1 series. The platform may add new capabilities but will never remove or break anything declared here.

fieldDefs.id: Unique identifier, e.g. 'MYCO-001'. Prefix with your initials.
fieldDefs.name: Human-readable display name.
fieldDefs.slug: URL-safe identifier used in routing, e.g. 'my-worker'. Lowercase, hyphens only.
fieldDefs.status: One of: live | waitlist | coming_soon | internal
fieldDefs.pricing.monthly: USD cents per month, or 0 for free.
fieldDefs.canvasTabs: Array of tab objects that appear in the worker's canvas panel.
fieldDefs.alexRegistration.priority: One of: highest | high | normal | low — how prominently Alex surfaces this worker.
fieldDefs.alexRegistration.acceptsTasks: Boolean — whether Alex can assign tasks to this worker.

guaranteedSignals.card:work-product: Generic work product — renders chat-driven structured output
guaranteedSignals.esign:documents: Anchored signing records — SOCIII chain proof for any signing rail
guaranteedSignals.card:kpi-summary: KPI grid — metrics from conversation payload

guaranteedTools.generate_image: Generate images via Fal.ai — available to all workers
guaranteedTools.lookup_vault_assets: Resolve Vault DTC IDs before writing logbook entries
guaranteedTools.anchor_signed_document: Create an immutable SOCIII anchor record for a completed signing

verticalTools.lookup_property: ATTOM property data — available to real-estate vertical workers
verticalTools.find_distressed_cre: ATTOM distressed CRE screen — cre-analyst only

platformGuarantees: Workers declared at v1.0.0 will continue to render on SOCIII for the life of the v1 series.
Canvas signals listed in canvasTabs.guaranteedSignals will always resolve to a rendered component.
Alex tools listed in alexTools.guaranteedTools are always injected — you do not need to declare them.
Worker slugs are globally unique — first to claim, first served.
The platform never modifies your worker spec without your consent.
canvasTabs.esign:documents is always available to any worker — no registration needed.
platformNonGuarantees: canvas signals NOT in guaranteedSignals may be removed after 90 days notice
The platform may add new required fields in v2.0.0 — v1 workers are grandfathered
Model providers (Anthropic, OpenAI) may change — workers must not assume a specific model

versioningRules.patchBump: Bug fixes, typo corrections, clarifications — no behavior change
versioningRules.minorBump: New optional fields, new guaranteed signals, new tools added — backward compatible
versioningRules.majorBump: New required fields, breaking changes — v1 workers grandfathered, migration guide shipped
